name: Caribbean Fried Bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bananas on a large nonstick baking sheet.
2. Pierce the skin of each banana several times with the tip of a sharp knife.
3. Bake at 400°F until the skins blacken completely, about 15 to 20 minutes.
4. In an 10-inch nonstick skillet over medium heat, melt butter and honey with allspice.
5. Open the peel of each banana with a knife, then gently peel one side.
6. Lay the peeled side in the skillet and remove the remaining peel.
7. Cook for about 5 minutes, spooning occasionally with cooking syrup.
8. Turn off the heat when any nearby flammable articles are removed.
9. Add rum to the pan and gently shake until flames subside.
10. Remove from heat and add lime juice.
11. Serve each banana warm with several spoonfuls of syrup.
Each serving contains approximately 2 fruit exchanges, 2½ other carb exchanges, 260 calories, 64 grams carbohydrate, 1 gram protein, 2 grams fat (including 1 gram saturated fat), 3 milligrams cholesterol, 14 milligrams sodium, 14 milligrams calcium and 3 grams dietary fiber.
